ddls:
CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle from which the data was collected */,
  "rpm_data" REAL /* Engine revolutions per minute (RPM) data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection in milliseconds */,
  "action" INTEGER /* Action code indicating the current driving action (e.g., accelerating, braking) */,
  "bump" INTEGER /* Bump indicator (1 for detected, 0 for not detected) */,
  "traffic_congestion" INTEGER /* Traffic congestion level (0 for no congestion, 1 for light, 2 for moderate, 3 for heavy) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Current speed of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* Current fuel level of the vehicle */,
  "location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's current location */,
  "location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's current location */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the vehicle (for electric vehicles) */,
  "engine_temperature" REAL /* Engine temperature of the vehicle */,
  "tire_pressure" TEXT /* Tire pressure data */,
  "gps_signal_strength" INTEGER /* GPS signal strength (0-5) */,
  "gps_accuracy" REAL /* GPS accuracy in meters */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data collection */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle */,
  "brake_pressure" REAL /* Brake pressure applied */,
  "steering_angle" REAL /* Steering angle of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES actions ("action_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_traffic_congestion FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_congestion") REFERENCES traffic_conditions ("condition_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity in liters */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was registered */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "mileage" TEXT /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle */,
  "gps_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle has GPS enabled */,
  "telematics_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vehicle has telematics enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the owner */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the owner */,
  "license_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the owner */,
  "notification_preference" TEXT /* Notification preference of the owner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driving action */,
  "action_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the driving action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the driving action */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the driving action */,
  "action_category" TEXT /* Category of the driving action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic condition */,
  "condition_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the traffic condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic condition */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the traffic condition */,
  "congestion_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the traffic congestion */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles in the area */,
  "number_of_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles in the area */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the congestion in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each telemetry data record
